DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/one/integr.description: Delete an integration by soft-deleting it.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/one/integrati.description: Returns a paginated list of integrations for the account.

parameters.description: Page number within the paginated result set.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Search integrations by name or application.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by enabled use cases (e.g., casb, ces). Matches integrations enrolled in any of the specified values. Can be specified multiple times.
parameters.name: use_cases

GET /accounts/{account_id}/one/integrati.description: Returns full integration details including use cases and permissions.

use_cases.description: Discover and secure SaaS applications

features.description: Automatically remediate security issues (requires write permissions)
features.name: Auto Remediation

use_cases.name: Cloud Access Security Broker

use_cases.description: Protect against email-based threats
use_cases.name: Cloud Email Security

schema.description: Serializer for v2 integration detail response with use cases.

dlp_profiles.description: DLP Profiles enabled for the integration.

is_paused.description: Whether the user paused the integration.

last_hydrated.description: Last time the integration was hydrated.

updated.description: When the integration was last updated.

use_cases.description: Use cases enabled for the integration.

PATCH /accounts/{account_id}/one/integra.description: Updates an integration's name, permissions, DLP profiles, use cases, or credentials.

schema.description: Serializer for v2 integration PATCH requests.

credentials.description: Partial credential fields to merge with existing.

dlp_profiles.description: List of DLP profile IDs to associate with the integration.

permissions.description: List of permission scopes granted to the integration.

use_cases.description: List of use case or feature slugs to enroll (e.g., ['casb', 'ces', 'auto_remediation']).

permissions.description: List of permission scopes granted to the integration.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/one/integrat.description: Creates a new integration for the specified application. Integration creation with OAuth is not supported by API at the moment. For other auth methods, use `GET /v2/applications/{slug}/credential-guide` to see the required credential structure and example payloads for each vendor.

schema.description: Serializer for v2 integration create requests.

application.description:
Vendor/application slug (e.g., GOOGLE_WORKSPACE).

* `BOX` - BOX
* `DROPBOX` - DROPBOX
* `GITHUB` - GITHUB
* `GOOGLE_WORKSPACE` - GOOGLE_WORKSPACE
* `MICROSOFT_INTERNAL` - MICROSOFT_INTERNAL
* `SALESFORCE` - SALESFORCE
* `SLACK` - SLACK

auth_method.description: Authentication method slug (uses default if omitted).

dlp_profiles.description: List of DLP profile IDs to associate.

permissions.description: List of permission scopes (uses policy defaults if empty).

use_cases.description: List of use case or feature slugs to enroll (e.g., ['casb', 'ces', 'auto_remediation']).
